MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: M. Smith; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Haleh Payandehjoo is present.
Attorney Shauna Matlin appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Brenne Meyro Meirowitz is present.
Attorney Christopher Walters representing the defendant through limited scope.

Judge McBride, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 220, for settlement discussions.

This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.
The trial date of JAN-17-2012 is vacated.
